ACTORTYPE.DESCRIPTION: Configure death effect settings for type:
ACTORTYPE.TITLE: Actor Type

AUTOHIDE.HINT: Automatically hide the token after the death effects finish.
AUTOHIDE.LABEL: Auto-Hide

AUTOTRANSPARENT.HINT: Automatically set the token's opacity to 0 after the death effects finish.
AUTOTRANSPARENT.LABEL: Auto-Transparent

EDITTIMELINE.HINT:
Edit the death effect animation timeline.
See the wiki for more information.
EDITTIMELINE.LABEL: Edit Timeline

ENABLE.HINT: Toggle on to automatically run death effects when actor is taken out.
ENABLE.LABEL: Enable Death Effects

REMOVEEFFECT.MESSAGE: Are you sure you wish to remove this effect?
REMOVEEFFECT.TITLE: Remove Effect

SOURCE.HINT: Select where to store the effect configuration for this token
SOURCE.LABEL: Configuration Source

ACTIVEEFFECT.HINT: Trigger condition when gaining a particular ActiveEffect
ACTIVEEFFECT.LABEL: Active Effect

TRIGGERCONDITION.HINT: The condition whereby to automatically trigger death effects
TRIGGERCONDITION.LABEL: Trigger Condition

RESOURCE.HINT: Trigger when a given resource (such as health) is equal to or less than 0
RESOURCE.LABEL: Actor Resource

STATUS.HINT: Trigger the actor's death effects when gaining a given status effect
STATUS.LABEL: Status Effect
